en.extract:
The short-tailed lark (Spizocorys fremantlii) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae.
It is found in Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, and Tanzania. Its natural habitats are dry savannah, subtropical or tropical dry shrubland, and subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland.


Taxonomy and systematics
The short-tailed lark was originally placed in the genus Calendula (which was subsequently renamed to Galerida) and then to the monotypic genus Pseudalaemon before it was re-classified to Spizocorys in 2014.


Subspecies
Three subspecies are recognized: 

Somali short-tailed lark (S. f. fremantlii) - (Lort Phillips, 1897): Found in south-eastern Ethiopia and Somalia
S. f. megaensis - (Benson, 1946): Found in southern Ethiopia and northern Kenya
Kenya short-tailed lark (S. f. delamerei) - (Sharpe, 1900): Originally described as a separate species. Found in southern Kenya and northern Tanzania


Behaviour and ecology


Food and feeding
The diet of the short-tailed lark consists mostly of vegetable material.


References

The '''short-tailed lark''' ('''''Spizocorys fremantlii''''') is a species of [[lark]] in the family [[Alaudidae]].

It is found in Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, and Tanzania. Its natural [[habitat]]s are dry [[savannah]], subtropical or tropical dry [[shrubland]], and subtropical or tropical dry lowland [[grassland]].<ref name="iucn status 13 November 2021" />

==Taxonomy and systematics==
The short-tailed lark was originally placed in the genus ''Calendula'' (which was subsequently renamed to ''[[Galerida]]'') and then to the monotypic genus ''[[Pseudalaemon]]'' before it was re-classified to ''Spizocorys'' in 2014.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://avibase.bsc-eoc.org/species.jsp?avibaseid=1AF3034A2D06DA0C|title=Spizocorys fremantlii - Avibase|website=avibase.bsc-eoc.org|access-date=2016-12-03}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/updates/archives-4-1-to-4-4/taxonomy-4-1-to-4-4/|title=Taxonomy 4.1 to 4.4 « IOC World Bird List|website=www.worldbirdnames.org|access-date=2016-12-03}}</ref>

=== Subspecies ===
Three [[subspecies]] are recognized:<ref>{{Cite journal|title=IOC World Bird List 6.4|url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/ioc-lists/crossref|journal=IOC World Bird List Datasets|doi=10.14344/ioc.ml.6.4|doi-access=free}}</ref> 
* '''Somali short-tailed lark''' (''S. f. fremantlii'') - <small>([[Ethelbert Lort Phillips|Lort Phillips]], 1897)</small>: Found in south-eastern Ethiopia and Somalia
* ''S. f. megaensis'' - <small>([[Constantine Walter Benson|Benson]], 1946)</small>: Found in southern Ethiopia and northern Kenya
* '''Kenya short-tailed lark''' (''S. f. delamerei'') - <small>([[Richard Bowdler Sharpe|Sharpe]], 1900)</small>: Originally described as a separate species. Found in southern Kenya and northern Tanzania

==Behaviour and ecology==
===Food and feeding===
The diet of the short-tailed lark consists mostly of vegetable material.<ref>{{Cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=jRjSBAAAQBAJ&q=%22Pseudalaemon%22+genus&pg=PA34|title=The Skylark|last=Donald|first=Paul|date=2010-06-30|publisher=Bloomsbury Publishing|isbn=978-1-4081-3334-7|language=en}}</ref>
[[File:TricholaemaPseudalaemonKeulemans, Pseudalaemon.jpg|thumb|left|Illustrated by Keulemans]]

zh.extract:
短尾百灵（学名：Pseudalaemon fremantlii），是百灵科短尾百灵属的一种，是游猎迁徙的候鸟，分布于索马里、肯尼亚、坦桑尼亚和埃塞俄比亚。全球活动范围约为515,000平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
短尾百灵的平均体重约为23.4克。栖息地包括干燥的稀树草原、亚热带或热带的（低地）干燥疏灌丛和亚热带或热带的（低地）干草原。


参考文献
